<?php namespace DeepCopy\Filter; use DeepCopy\Reflection\ReflectionHelper; /** * @final */ class SetNullFilter implements Filter { /** * Sets the object property to null. * * {@inheritdoc} */ public function apply($object, $property, $objectCopier) { $reflectionProperty = ReflectionHelper::getProperty($object, $property); if (PHP_VERSION_ID < 80100) { $reflectionProperty->setAccessible(true); } $reflectionProperty->setValue($object, null); } }
